# zaps.work

> zaps.work is a free, multilingual collection of practical cost calculators and quote tools for fabrication, local services, and independent work.

## About

zaps.work helps people turn job inputs into a cost breakdown, margin check, and customer-ready quote. Available scenarios cover 3D printing, pressure washing, laser cutting, residential cleaning, and house painting.

Calculations and PDF or CSV generation run in the user's browser. Customer names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, company details, quote numbers, item names, notes, and other customer-related fields are not sent to or stored in the product analytics database.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://zaps.work/): Overview of the cost calculator and quote tool library.
- [Tool library](https://zaps.work/tools): Available and planned calculators.
- [3D Print Cost Calculator](https://zaps.work/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Calculate filament, machine time, electricity, labor, failure risk, margin, shipping, tax, and quote totals. Export PDF or CSV.
- [Pressure Washing Quote Calculator](https://zaps.work/tools/pressure-washing-quote): Estimate surface work, crew time, operating costs, minimum charges, and margin.
- [Laser Cutting Cost Calculator](https://zaps.work/tools/laser-cutting-cost-calculator): Estimate sheet material, waste, machine time, setup, handling, finishing, quantity, and margin from manual CAD/CAM statistics.
- [Cleaning Quote Generator](https://zaps.work/tools/cleaning-quote-generator): Estimate cleaner-hours, labor, overhead, supplies, travel, add-ons, minimum fees, and margin for residential cleaning.
- [House Painting Quote Calculator](https://zaps.work/tools/house-painting-quote): Build a house painting quote from paintable area, coats, coverage, paint waste, material cost, labor production, surface condition, overhead, minimum fee, margin, and tax.
- [Pricing Guides](https://zaps.work/guides): Practical job costing and quote guides.
- [How to Price House Painting Jobs](https://zaps.work/guides/how-to-price-house-painting-jobs): A practical guide to scope, paint coverage, labor production, preparation, margin, minimum charges, and customer-ready painting quotes.
- [How to Price 3D Prints](https://zaps.work/guides/how-to-price-3d-prints): A formula-based guide to 3D print costs, margin, and customer quotes.
- [How to Price Pressure Washing Jobs](https://zaps.work/guides/how-to-price-pressure-washing-jobs): A step-by-step guide to scope, costs, margin, and minimum charges.
- [How to Price Laser Cutting Jobs](https://zaps.work/guides/how-to-price-laser-cutting-jobs): A practical guide to sheet material, nesting waste, machine time, setup, finishing, and target margin.
- [How to Price House Cleaning Jobs](https://zaps.work/guides/how-to-price-house-cleaning-jobs): A step-by-step guide to cleaner-hours, job costs, add-ons, minimum fees, recurring discounts, and margin.
- [Privacy](https://zaps.work/privacy): Data boundary and analytics practices.

## Localized pages

- [繁體中文首頁](https://zaps.work/zh-hant): Traditional Chinese site navigation.
- [繁體中文 3D 列印成本計算器](https://zaps.work/zh-hant/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Traditional Chinese calculator page.
- [Deutsch Startseite](https://zaps.work/de): German site navigation.
- [Deutscher 3D-Druckkostenrechner](https://zaps.work/de/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): German calculator page.
- [日本語 3Dプリントコスト計算機](https://zaps.work/ja/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Japanese calculator page.
- [Calculadora de costes de impresión 3D](https://zaps.work/es/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Spanish calculator page.
- [Calculateur de coût d’impression 3D](https://zaps.work/fr/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): French calculator page.
- [Calculadora de custos de impressão 3D](https://zaps.work/pt-br/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Brazilian Portuguese calculator page.
- [3D 프린팅 비용 계산기](https://zaps.work/ko/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Korean calculator page.

Pressure washing, laser cutting, residential cleaning, pricing guides, and guide articles are also available under each locale prefix listed above. English remains unprefixed.

## Tool capabilities

- Multiple print items with editable quantity and material inputs.
- Scenario-specific inputs for fabrication and local services, including material, machine time, labor, operating costs, waste, failure risk, setup, handling, shipping, tax, margin, and minimum fees where applicable.
- Global currency selection with search and scrolling, including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, TWD, and other major currencies. Monetary inputs are converted when the selected currency changes and formatted with the currency's standard decimal precision.
- Physical unit switches convert the underlying area, rate, thickness, and length values where applicable instead of changing labels only.
- Local browser printing or PDF saving plus customer-ready CSV exports.
- Privacy-safe aggregate export events for product analysis; customer-related free text is excluded.

## Source and feedback

- [Open-source repository](https://github.com/wudanglaodao/zaps-work-quote): Source code, calculation logic, privacy boundary, and release workflow.
- [Feedback and issues](https://github.com/wudanglaodao/zaps-work-quote/issues): Report bugs or suggest tools.
- [Contact](mailto:info@lopuo.com): Contact zaps.work.

## Canonical guidance

Use the page language that matches the reader. English pages use unprefixed URLs; Traditional Chinese, German, Japanese, Spanish, French, Brazilian Portuguese, and Korean pages use their locale prefixes. Use the linked page content as the source of truth for current features and supported inputs.
